DALY HAS SHOWN THAT ALL OF HIS EARNINGS ARE EXEMPT AS NECESSARY FOR HIS SUPPORT AND/OR THE SUPPORT OF HIS FAMILY. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EGC FINANCIAL LLCC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Defendant Rafael Daly's claim of exemption is granted in full. No monies will be withheld from Mr. Daly's earnings due to be paid toward the judgment against him. Mr. Daly has shown that all of his earnings are exempt as necessary for his support and/or the support of his family.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Continued To Aug-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EGC FINANCIAL LLCC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Continued to August 21, 2025, on the court's motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-27-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jonathan Nili Vaknin, Esq., 415-851-5297 Specially Appearing for Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor EGC FINANCIAL, LLCA Limited Liability Company
No other appearances

Not contested/argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EGC FINANCIAL LLC's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption

The judgment debtor's claim of exemption is granted. (CCP 704.225 [necessary means exemption for deposit account].) The levying officer is directed to release all held funds to the judgment debtor.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
